doc_title: Unauthorized Practice of Law — ABA Model Rule 5.5
label: partial
reason: The document accurately reflects ABA Model Rule 5.5's core structure but subsection (b) contains interpretive additions and emphatic claims not found in the official rule text, and overstates restrictions regarding emergency exceptions.
response_turn1:
